## What changed?

- describe the behavior, packaging, or documentation change

## Why does it matter?

- user impact, operator impact, platform impact, or security impact

## Which areas does this touch?

- [ ] docs only
- [ ] auth, secret, or crypto behavior
- [ ] installer, update, or rollback flow
- [ ] runtime, deployment, or boundary behavior
- [ ] packaging, release, or manifest behavior
- [ ] logging, telemetry, or crash behavior

## What did you check?

- tests, manual checks, or the reason no direct validation was possible
- whether trust-boundary assumptions changed
- whether rollback or recovery behavior was considered

## Documentation sync

- [ ] I updated docs if commands, paths, artifacts, or behavior changed
- [ ] I updated security or threat-model notes if the change affects them
- [ ] I called out any remaining uncertainty explicitly

## Reviewer focus

Call out the highest-risk part of the change.
